name: La Chatelain Salad Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Juice from jar of sliced dill pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine the 7 ingredients.
2. Puree for 10 seconds or until all ingredients are thoroughly incorporated.
3. Pour the dressing into the top of a double boiler that has been sprayed with non-stick spray.
4. Over simmering water, constantly stir and scrape the pan with a rubber spatula.
5. Cook the dressing until it reaches the consistency of buttermilk. Do not boil the water rapidly or the egg will scramble.
6. Transfer the dressing to a glass container and store in the refrigerator until cool.
7. Serve over romaine lettuce and croutons, preferably from the La Madeleine bakery where this copycat recipe was copied.
8. Add a generous sprinkling of Kraft Parmesan cheese and toss.
